---
title: "Preqin"
page-layout: article
---

# Preqin

## Description

Alternative assets database covering private equity, private debt, real estate, infrastructure, natural resources, and hedge funds. Supports private markets and investment research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, GIS & Spatial Data
- **Data/resource type:** Financial & Market Data, Real Estate & Property Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** WRDS Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Financial & Market Data, Real Estate & Property Data, Data Platform

## Access notes

Private data from Preqin is available in WRDS.

## Links

- [Access resource](http://web.library.yale.edu/access-preqin)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
